character.name: ant-forager
character.prompt: small chunky-cute worker ant, dark warm-brown body (#3a1f12), three body segments, six legs in tripod stance, oversized head with simple antennae, no crown. Slightly hunched loaded posture. Small carry-pouch slung on the side of the abdomen, warm amber leather strap (#d9b271) integrated into the body, strap is snug against the abdomen not floating. Body and proportions identical to worker-ant family.
